meta.title: Dominik Machowiak | Salesforce Marketing Cloud & Front-End Developer
meta.description: Dominik Machowiak is a Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer at Deloitte and front-end developer. View selected work, experience and DominikOS.

hero.name: Dominik Machowiak
hero.tagline: At Deloitte, I develop Salesforce Marketing Cloud solutions. I also build responsive websites with HTML, CSS and JavaScript, and I work with React.

items.title: Marketing Automation
items.description: I develop and deploy Salesforce Marketing Cloud solutions at Deloitte. My automotive-sector work includes technical consultation and work on approximately 300 email and SMS messages for a multi-brand marketing transformation.

items.title: Front-End Development
items.description: I design and develop responsive websites with HTML, CSS and JavaScript. My selected work includes websites for property management and cleaning businesses.

items.title: Technical Foundation
items.description: My Computing and IT Software studies at The Open University complement practical work in front-end development and marketing automation. I have also spent time learning React alongside my core web-development tools.

items.title: Welcom-Inn Website
items.description: A responsive website designed and developed for a property management company to present its rental properties and services.

items.title: Rubicall Website
items.description: A responsive website designed and developed for a cleaning company, then expanded when the business moved into Airbnb services.

works.name: Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer
works.desc: Led a marketing automation project for a Polish automotive client, providing technical consultation and developing and deploying marketing technology solutions. Contributed to a marketing transformation covering multiple car brands, including work on approximately 300 email and SMS messages in Email Studio with HTML, CSS, JavaScript and AMPscript.

works.name: Web Developer
works.desc: Designed and developed a website for a property management company using HTML, CSS and JavaScript. The website presents the company's properties and services.

works.name: Front-End Web Developer
works.desc: Designed and developed a website for a cleaning company using HTML, CSS and JavaScript, then returned to expand it when the business moved into Airbnb services.

works.name: Intern Front-End Web Developer
works.desc: Volunteered as a front-end web developer for a small electronics company, updating individual pages to improve the website's presentation and functionality.

works.name: BSc Computing and IT Software
works.desc: Studied Computing and IT Software at The Open University.

items.name: Norbert
items.feedback: Our website underwent a remarkable transformation with Dominik's input and changes. His expertise and dedication brought a fresh appeal and functionality to the site, impressing both us and our customers. Dominik's professionalism and attention to detail allowed us to upgrade our website to create a seamless user experience. We're immensely grateful for his contribution, and it has undoubtedly boosted our online presence and business prospects.

items.name: Agnieszka
items.feedback: I greatly appreciate Dominik's efforts in developing a functional website for our company. Despite my limited knowledge of websites, he guided us patiently. The website effectively showcases our rental properties and services. Dominik's expertise has improved our online presence, simplifying the exploration of our offerings for potential clients. I recommend Dominik for his skillful and patient approach to website development.

items.name: Barbara
items.feedback: I'm thrilled to share my positive experience with Dominik at Rubicall. He created a fantastic website for our cleaning business! I'm not very tech-savvy, but Dominik was patient and understood our needs. The website looks great, works great on phones and computers, and our clients love it. I highly recommend Dominik for any business looking to expand their business online.
